form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[作业卡编号] workOrderId[工单ID] operationId[工序ID] lineNo[行号] status[状态] workcenterId[工作中心] ==========>progress[执行进度]====== plannedQuantity[计划数量] completedQuantity[完工数量] scrappedQuantity[报废数量] actualStartTime[实际开始时间] actualEndTime[实际结束时间] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] sourceScheduleId[APS排程来源(弱参照)] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[作业卡编号] workOrderId[工单ID] operationId[工序ID] lineNo[行号] status[状态] workcenterId[工作中心] ==========>progress[执行进度]====== plannedQuantity[计划数量] completedQuantity[完工数量] scrappedQuantity[报废数量] actualStartTime[实际开始时间] actualEndTime[实际结束时间] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[作业卡编号] status[状态] workOrderId[工单ID]
